transcript: Carlos! My name’s Lumbar Deniro, chiropractor. How are ya today, sir?
Awesome. You’ve got a free gift certificate for a massage—
I guess a Secret Santa-kinda thing—
And it’s already taken care of for you, uh, any time you’d like to schedule that in. Happy New Year to you. I guess it’s a Secret Santa, is what it was for ya!

Free gift certificate and, again, I’m Lumbar Deniro, if you wanna feed that to your search engine. Also, for my clients, I’m also a saxophonist. So I’ll treat you to some of my horn, my brass… during your session, as well. And, uh, lotta my clients are—
—near religious with their fervor, Carlos! Hey, Carlos, what’re ya lookin’ at on your, uh, calendar, there, for a redemption on your certificate that we have, here?
The fervor out there is just heatin’ up, Carlos. Whadda ya got goin’ on in January, here? [exhales] [delay]

I tell you, your good fortune is continuing, there, Carlos. I’m gonna get with ya, we’re gonna work your tissue, your sternum, my horn will be involved—m’brass!—any time you wish. This certificate has already been acquired. Just transferring it over to you. So you’ve got some admirers out there, my friend! [exhales]
[laughs] I appreciate that! This is amazing! I’ve never won anything!
I like to begin with a little brass—little horn, like I say—loosen ya up, get into your lumbar for two, three hours, work the tissue in there! It’s gonna tickle ya pink!—
It’s just gonna tickle ya pink. It is. I’ve been here for 14 years, same location, my friend!
I’ve treated Brian Setzer, I’ve treated Pee-wee Herman; I’ve treated everybody around here! It’s just gonna tickle ya pink!—
It’s just gonna tickle ya pink, Carlos. It is. No, don’t fight it; that’s the thing to remember when we do begin our session. Don’t fight it—
—go with it… ma horn, ma brass, comin’ your way—comin’ your direction, my friend!
Ay, any time! And then we can get into Microsoft Outlook and then you can put it on your calendar and then we’ll connect, we’ll intersect! Do a little alto sax—solo!—
Just a sample. Just dome dribs and drabs—carry ya through, carry ya through!
Spectacular! Look for me in your inbox—
Thank you! I’m gonna— I’m gonna—
Look for me in your inbox.
[pitch-shifted] Look for me in your inbox. We’ll connect, we’ll intersect, we’ll crack ya loose! Loosen ya up a bit here and there! [exhales] [delay]
[pitch-shifted] Thank you so much! Have a splendid night!
Hi, Carlos! This is Justina with Elements Massage. I was transferred to you?
Yeah, uh, I was just told you have some questions for me?
Uh, questions...? Um, no. I thin— I think you guys have the wrong number or maybe the wrong Carlos.
Uh, I’m not sure. They just— Some guy, um, called me and said to speak to you… that you’ve been looking for an Elements Massage.
[laughs] What? Uh… No, I think you have the wrong number.
I don’t know. They literally just transferred me. It’s like from the same number right now. They just did your extension.
Hello! I’m unable to answer your call right now!
Um… Yeah, I’m sorry, I think you have the wrong number.
